cty.NumberIntVal(800),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"dinner\":    cty.NumberIntVal(2000), // sensitive key\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"map_whole\": cty.MapVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"breakfast\": cty.StringVal(\"pizza\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"dinner\":    cty.StringVal(\"pizza\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": cty.StringVal(\"not secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": cty.StringVal(\"not secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.EmptyObject),\n\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"ami\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"list_field\"}, cty.IndexStep{Key: cty.NumberIntVal(1)}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"map_key\"}, cty.IndexStep{Key: cty.StringVal(\"dinner\")}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"map_whole\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"nested_block\"}},\n\t\t\t\tcty.Path{cty.GetAttrStep{Name: \"nested_block_set\"}},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":         {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"list_field\": {Type: cty.List(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_key\":    {Type: cty.Map(cty.Number), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"map_whole\":  {Type: cty.Map(cty.String), Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"another\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be destroyed\n  - resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      - ami        = (sensitive value) -> null\n      - id         = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\" -> null\n      - list_field = [\n          - \"hello\",\n          - (sensitive value),\n        ] -> null\n      - map_key    = {\n          - \"breakfast\" = 800\n          - \"dinner\"    = (sensitive value)\n        } -> null\n      - map_whole  = (sensitive value) -> null\n\n      - nested_block_set {\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive value forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": cty.SetVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": cty.StringVal(\"changed\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths: []cty.Path{\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"nested_block_set\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"an_attr\": {Type: cty.String, Required: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSet,\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"nested_block_set\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n\n      - nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n      + nested_block_set { # forces replacement\n          # At least one attribute in this block is (or was) sensitive,\n          # so its contents will not be displayed.\n        }\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-BEFORE\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"ami-AFTER\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"ami\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ ami = (sensitive value) # forces replacement\n        id  = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"update with sensitive nested type attribute forcing replacement\": {\n\t\t\tAction: plans.DeleteThenCreate,\n\t\t\tMode:   addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"top-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\": cty.StringVal(\"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     cty.StringVal(\"not-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": cty.StringVal(\"new-secret\"),\n\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"conn_info\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tNesting: configschema.NestingSingle,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"user\":     {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"password\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Sensitive: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"conn_info\"),\n\t\t\t\tcty.GetAttrPath(\"password\"),\n\t\t\t),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example must be replaced\n-/+ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ conn_info = { # forces replacement\n          ~ password = (sensitive value)\n            # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n        }\n        id        = \"i-02ae66f368e8518a9\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_moved(t *testing.T) {\n\tprevRunAddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\tName: \"previous\",\n\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance)\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]testCase{\n\t\t\"moved and updated\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.Update,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"boop\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.example will be updated in-place\n  # (moved from test_instance.previous)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n      ~ bar = \"baz\" -> \"boop\"\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"moved without changes\": {\n\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\tAction:      plans.NoOp,\n\t\t\tMode:        addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"12345\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"foo\": cty.StringVal(\"hello\"),\n\t\t\t\t\"bar\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\tSchema: &configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\"bar\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\tRequiredReplace: cty.NewPathSet(),\n\t\t\tExpectedOutput: `  # test_instance.previous has moved to test_instance.example\n    resource \"test_instance\" \"example\" {\n        id  = \"12345\"\n        # (2 unchanged attributes hidden)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\trunTestCases(t, testCases)\n}\n\ntype testCase struct {\n\tAction               plans.Action\n\tActionReason         plans.ResourceInstanceChangeActionReason\n\tModuleInst           addrs.ModuleInstance\n\tMode                 addrs.ResourceMode\n\tInstanceKey          addrs.InstanceKey\n\tDeposedKey           states.DeposedKey\n\tBefore               cty.Value\n\tBeforeSensitivePaths []cty.Path\n\tAfter                cty.Value\n\tAfterSensitivePaths  []cty.Path\n\tSchema               *configschema.Block\n\tRequiredReplace      cty.PathSet\n\tExpectedOutput       string\n\tPrevRunAddr          addrs.AbsResourceInstance\n}\n\nfunc runTestCases(t *testing.T, testCases map[string]testCase) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tty := tc.Schema.ImpliedType()\n\n\t\t\tbeforeVal := tc.Before\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase beforeVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !beforeVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tbeforeVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterVal := tc.After\n\t\t\tswitch { // Some fixups to make the test cases a little easier to write\n\t\t\tcase afterVal.IsNull():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.NullVal(ty) // allow mistyped nulls\n\t\t\tcase !afterVal.IsKnown():\n\t\t\t\tafterVal = cty.UnknownVal(ty) // allow mistyped unknowns\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\taddr := addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\tMode: tc.Mode,\n\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\tName: \"example\",\n\t\t\t}.Instance(tc.InstanceKey).Absolute(tc.ModuleInst)\n\n\t\t\tprevRunAddr := tc.PrevRunAddr\n\t\t\t// If no previous run address is given, reuse the current address\n\t\t\t// to make initialization easier\n\t\t\tif prevRunAddr.Resource.Resource.Type == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tprevRunAddr = addr\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tbeforeDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(beforeVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic before value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tafterDynamicValue, err := plans.NewDynamicValue(afterVal, ty)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to create dynamic after value: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tsrc := &plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\tChangeSrc: plans.ChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\t\tAction:               tc.Action,\n\t\t\t\t\tBefore:               beforeDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tBeforeSensitivePaths: tc.BeforeSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfter:                afterDynamicValue,\n\t\t\t\t\tAfterSensitivePaths:  tc.AfterSensitivePaths,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\n\t\t\t\tAddr:        addr,\n\t\t\t\tPrevRunAddr: prevRunAddr,\n\t\t\t\tDeposedKey:  tc.DeposedKey,\n\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\t\t\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tActionReason:    tc.ActionReason,\n\t\t\t\tRequiredReplace: tc.RequiredReplace,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\ttfschemas := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tsrc.ProviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\tDataSources: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsrc.Addr.Resource.Resource.Type: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: tc.Schema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tjsonchanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalResourceChanges([]*plans.ResourceInstanceChangeSrc{src}, tfschemas)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"failed to marshal resource changes: \" + err.Error())\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(tfschemas)\n\t\t\tchange := structured.FromJsonChange(jsonchanges[0].Change, attribute_path.AlwaysMatcher())\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiff := diff{\n\t\t\t\tchange: jsonchanges[0],\n\t\t\t\tdiff:   differ.ComputeDiffForBlock(change, jsonschemas[jsonchanges[0].ProviderName].ResourceSchemas[jsonchanges[0].Type].Block),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDiff(renderer, diff, proposedChange)\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(output, tc.ExpectedOutput); diff != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"wrong output\\nexpected:\\n%s\\nactual:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\\n\", tc.ExpectedOutput, output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestOutputChanges(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.OutputChangeSrc\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"new output value\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  + foo = \"bar\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"removed output\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  - foo = \"bar\" -> null`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"single string change\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"element added to list\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"foo\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.ListVal([]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"alpha\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"beta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"gamma\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"delta\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"epsilon\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ foo = [\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n        \"beta\",\n      + \"gamma\",\n        \"delta\",\n        # (1 unchanged element hidden)\n    ]`,\n\t\t},\n\t\t\"multiple outputs changed, one sensitive\": {\n\t\t\t[]*plans.OutputChangeSrc{\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"a\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(1),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.NumberIntVal(2),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"b\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"hunter2\"),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.StringVal(\"correct-horse-battery-staple\"),\n\t\t\t\t\ttrue,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t\toutputChange(\n\t\t\t\t\t\"c\",\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(false),\n\t\t\t\t\tcty.BoolVal(true),\n\t\t\t\t\tfalse,\n\t\t\t\t),\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t`  ~ a = 1 -> 2\n  ~ b = (sensitive value)\n  ~ c = false -> true`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tchanges := &plans.ChangesSrc{\n\t\t\t\tOutputs: tc.changes,\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\toutputs, err := jsonplan.MarshalOutputChanges(changes)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal output changes\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tOutputChanges: outputs,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\toutput := renderHumanDiffOutputs(renderer, diffs.outputs)\n\t\t\tif output != tc.output {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"Unexpected diff.\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\n\", output, tc.output)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc TestResourceChange_deferredActions(t *testing.T) {\n\tcolor := &colorstring.Colorize{Colors: colorstring.DefaultColors, Disable: true}\n\tproviderAddr := addrs.AbsProviderConfig{\n\t\tProvider: addrs.NewDefaultProvider(\"test\"),\n\t\tModule:   addrs.RootModule,\n\t}\n\ttestCases := map[string]struct {\n\t\tchanges []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange\n\t\toutput  string\n\t}{\n\t\t\"deferred create action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonAbsentPrereq,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because a prerequisite for this resource has not yet been created)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred create action unknown for_each\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonInstanceCountUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.WildcardKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Create,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.NullVal(cty.DynamicPseudoType),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.UnknownVal(cty.String),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.UnknownVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance[*] was deferred\n  # (because the number of resource instances is unknown)\n  + resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      + ami  = \"bar\"\n      + disk = (known after apply)\n      + id   = (known after apply)\n\n      + root_block_device (known after apply)\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred update action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonProviderConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"baz\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the provider configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      ~ ami = \"bar\" -> \"baz\"\n        id  = \"foo\"\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\n\t\t\"deferred destroy action\": {\n\t\t\tchanges: []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t{\n\t\t\t\t\tDeferredReason: providers.DeferredReasonResourceConfigUnknown,\n\t\t\t\t\tChange: &plans.ResourceInstanceChange{\n\t\t\t\t\t\tAddr: addrs.Resource{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tMode: addrs.ManagedResourceMode,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType: \"test_instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tName: \"instance\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}.Instance(addrs.NoKey).Absolute(addrs.RootModuleInstance),\n\t\t\t\t\t\tProviderAddr: providerAddr,\n\t\t\t\t\t\tChange: plans.Change{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAction: plans.Update,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBefore: cty.ObjectVal(map[string]cty.Value{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.StringVal(\"foo\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.StringVal(\"bar\"),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tAfter: cty.NullVal(cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"id\":  cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"ami\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"disk\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        cty.Number,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": cty.Object(map[string]cty.Type{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t})),\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\toutput: `  # test_instance.instance was deferred\n  # (because the resource configuration is unknown)\n  ~ resource \"test_instance\" \"instance\" {\n      - ami = \"bar\" -> null\n      - id  = \"foo\" -> null\n    }`,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\n\tfor name, tc := range testCases {\n\t\tt.Run(name, func(t *testing.T) {\n\t\t\tblockSchema := testSchema(configschema.NestingSingle)\n\t\t\tfullSchema := &terraform.Schemas{\n\t\t\t\tProviders: map[addrs.Provider]providers.ProviderSchema{\n\t\t\t\t\tproviderAddr.Provider: {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tResourceTypes: map[string]providers.Schema{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\"test_instance\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tBlock: blockSchema,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tvar changes []*plans.DeferredResourceInstanceChangeSrc\n\t\t\tfor _, change := range tc.changes {\n\t\t\t\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode(blockSchema.ImpliedType())\n\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"Failed to encode change: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\tchanges = append(changes, changeSrc)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\tdeferredChanges, err := jsonplan.MarshalDeferredResourceChanges(changes, fullSchema)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal deferred changes: %s\", err)\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\trenderer := Renderer{Colorize: color}\n\t\t\tjsonschemas := jsonprovider.MarshalForRenderer(fullSchema)\n\t\t\tdiffs := precomputeDiffs(Plan{\n\t\t\t\tDeferredChanges: deferredChanges,\n\t\t\t\tProviderSchemas: jsonschemas,\n\t\t\t}, plans.NormalMode)\n\n\t\t\t// TODO: Add diffing for outputs\n\t\t\t// TODO: Make sure it's true and either make it a single entity in the test case or deal with a list here\n\t\t\toutput, _ := renderHumanDeferredDiff(renderer, diffs.deferred[0])\n\t\t\tif diff := cmp.Diff(tc.output, output); len(diff) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tt.Errorf(\"unexpected output\\ngot:\\n%s\\nwant:\\n%s\\ndiff:\\n%s\", output, tc.output, diff)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t})\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc outputChange(name string, before, after cty.Value, sensitive bool) *plans.OutputChangeSrc {\n\taddr := addrs.AbsOutputValue{\n\t\tOutputValue: addrs.OutputValue{Name: name},\n\t}\n\n\tchange := &plans.OutputChange{\n\t\tAddr: addr, Change: plans.Change{\n\t\t\tBefore: before,\n\t\t\tAfter:  after,\n\t\t},\n\t\tSensitive: sensitive,\n\t}\n\n\tchangeSrc, err := change.Encode()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\"failed to encode change for %s: %s\", addr, err))\n\t}\n\n\treturn changeSrc\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType) attribute and one block\nfunc testSchema(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// A basic test schema using a configurable NestingMode for one (NestedType)\n// attribute marked sensitive.\nfunc testSchemaSensitive(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tSensitive: true,\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc testSchemaMultipleBlocks(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\"disks\": {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\"leaf_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\n// similar to testSchema with the addition of a \"new_field\" block\nfunc testSchemaPlus(nesting configschema.NestingMode) *configschema.Block {\n\tvar diskKey = \"disks\"\n\tif nesting == configschema.NestingSingle {\n\t\tdiskKey = \"disk\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &configschema.Block{\n\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\"id\":  {Type: cty.String, Optional: true, Computed: true},\n\t\t\t\"ami\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\tdiskKey: {\n\t\t\t\tNestedType: &configschema.Object{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"mount_point\": {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"size\":        {Type: cty.String, Optional: true},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t\tBlockTypes: map[string]*configschema.NestedBlock{\n\t\t\t\"root_block_device\": {\n\t\t\t\tBlock: configschema.Block{\n\t\t\t\t\tAttributes: map[string]*configschema.Attribute{\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"volume_type\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\"new_field\": {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tType:     cty.String,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tOptional: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tComputed: true,\n\t\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\t},\n\t\t\t\tNesting: nesting,\n\t\t\t},\n\t\t},\n\t}\n}\n\nfunc marshalJson(t *testing.T, data interface{}) json.RawMessage {\n\tresult, err := json.Marshal(data)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tt.Fatalf(\"failed to marshal json: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [

89. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/find_all_updates.py << 'EOF'\nimport re\n\n# Read the file\nwith open('/tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go', 'r') as f:\n    content = f.read()\n\n# Split by test cases\ntest_cases = re.split(r'(?<!\\w)([\"\\'])([^\"\\']+)\\1\\s*:\\s*\\{', content)\n\ncount = 0\nfor i in range(2, len(test_cases), 3):\n    test_name = test_cases[i]\n    test_content = test_cases[i+1] if i+1 < len(test_cases) else \"\"\n    \n    # Check if this is an \"in-place update\" test with unknown blocks\n    if 'in-place update' in test_name and 'unknown' in test_name and 'block' in test_name:\n        # Check the action\n        action_match = re.search(r'Action:\\s*plans\\.(\\w+)', test_content)\n        if action_match:\n            action = action_match.group(1)\n            # Check for the pattern\n            if re.search(r'\\+\\s+\\w+\\s+\\(known after apply\\)', test_content):\n                if action == 'Update':\n                    print(f\"Test: {test_name} - Action: {action} - Has '+ ... (known after apply)'\")\n                    count += 1\n\nprint(f\"\\nTotal: {count}\")\nEOF\npython3 /tmp/find_all_updates.py"
}
Output

}

{

Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "// Copyright (c) HashiCorp, Inc.\n// SPDX-License-Identifier: BUSL-1.1\n\npackage renderers\n\nimport (\n\t\"fmt\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/command/jsonformat/computed\"\n\n\t\"github.com/hashicorp/terraform/internal/plans\"\n)\n\nvar _ computed.DiffRenderer = (*unknownRenderer)(nil)\n\nfunc Unknown(before computed.Diff) computed.DiffRenderer {\n\treturn &unknownRenderer{\n\t\tbefore: before,\n\t}\n}\n\ntype unknownRenderer struct {\n\tNoWarningsRenderer\n\n\tbefore computed.Diff\n}\n\nfunc (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {\n\tif diff.Action == plans.Create || renderer.before.Renderer == nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"(known after apply)%s\", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n\t}\n\n\tbeforeOpts := opts.Clone()\n\t// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.\n\tbeforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true\n\tif diff.Replace {\n\t\t// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown\n\t\t// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.\n\t\tbeforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true\n\t}\n\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\"%s -> (known after apply)%s\", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))\n}\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go",
    "numLines": 43,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 43
  },
  "type": "text"
}

99. Bash @ -
Input
{
  "command": "cat > /tmp/comprehensive_check.py << 'EOF'\nimport re\n\nwith open('/tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go', 'r') as f:\n    lines = f.readlines()\n\ncurrent_test = None\ncurrent_action = None\nstart_line = 0\nfound_plus_unknown = False\n\nfor i, line in enumerate(lines):\n    # Look for test case start\n    if re.match(r'\\s*\"[^\"]+\": \\{$', line):\n        current_test = re.search(r'\"([^\"]+)\"', line).group(1)\n        start_line = i + 1\n        current_action = None\n        found_plus_unknown = False\n    \n    # Look for Action line\n    if 'Action: plans.' in line:\n        action_match = re.search(r'Action:\\s*plans\\.(\\w+)', line)\n        if action_match:\n            current_action = action_match.group(1)\n    \n    # Look for \"unknown\" and \"block\" keywords in test name and content\n    if current_test and 'unknown' in current_test and 'block' in current_test:\n        # Look for + lines with (known after apply)\n        if re.search(r'\\+\\s+\\w+.*\\(known after apply\\)', line):\n            found_plus_unknown = True\n            if current_action == 'Update':\n                print(f\"Found at line {i+1}: {current_test} - Action: {current_action}\")\n            elif current_action:\n                print(f\"SKIP at line {i+1}: {current_test} - Action: {current_action}\")\nEOF\npython3 /tmp/comprehensive_check.py"
}
Output
{
  "interrupted": false,
  "isImage": false,
  "noOutputExpected": false,
  "stderr": "",
  "stdout": "SKIP at line 3503: in-place create - unknown block - Action: Create\nFound at line 3551: in-place update - unknown block - Action: Update\nSKIP at line 3610: in-place update - unknown block with replace - Action: CreateThenDelete\nSKIP at line 4230: in-place create - unknown block - Action: Create\nFound at line 4278: in-place update - unknown block - Action: Update\nSKIP at line 4337: in-place update - unknown block with replace - Action: CreateThenDelete\nSKIP at line 4760: in-place create - unknown block - Action: Create\nFound at line 4808: in-place update - unknown block - Action: Update\nSKIP at line 4867: in-place update - unknown block with replace - Action: CreateThenDelete\nSKIP at line 5832: in-place create - unknown block - Action: Create"
}

        Code Changes (12)
        
1. EDIT /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go
Before
func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if diff.Action == plans.Create {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
	if diff.Replace {
		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
}
After
func (renderer unknownRenderer) RenderHuman(diff computed.Diff, indent int, opts computed.RenderHumanOpts) string {
	if diff.Action == plans.Create || renderer.before.Renderer == nil {
		return fmt.Sprintf("(known after apply)%s", forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
	}

	beforeOpts := opts.Clone()
	// Never render null suffix for children of unknown changes.
	beforeOpts.OverrideNullSuffix = true
	if diff.Replace {
		// If we're displaying forces replacement for the overall unknown
		// change, then do not display it for the before specifically.
		beforeOpts.ForbidForcesReplacement = true
	}
	return fmt.Sprintf("%s -> (known after apply)%s", renderer.before.RenderHuman(indent, beforeOpts), forcesReplacement(diff.Replace, opts))
}

      ~ ami   = "ami-BEFORE" -> "ami-AFTER"
        id    = "i-02ae66f368e8518a9"
        # (1 unchanged attribute hidden)

      + root_block_device (known after apply)

done

28. $ sed -n '3563,3618p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -30
29. $ for line_num in 3503 3551 3610 4230 4278 4337 4760 4808 4867 5832 7811 7851; do
  # Search backwards for the test name (the line with ":")
  sed -n "1,$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E '"[^"]*": \{' | tail -1
done
30. $ for line_num in 3503 3551 3610 4230 4278 4337 4760 4808 4867; do
  # Find the test case name and action
  test_start=$(sed -n "1,$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -n '".*": {' | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
  action_line=$(sed -n "${test_start},$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action:' | head -1)
  test_name=$(sed -n "${test_start}p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/')
  echo "Line $line_num: $test_name - $action_line"
done
31. $ for line_num in 5832 7811 7851; do
  # Find the test case name and action
  test_start=$(sed -n "1,$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -n '".*": {' | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
  action_line=$(sed -n "${test_start},$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action:' | head -1)
  test_name=$(sed -n "${test_start}p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/')
  echo "Line $line_num: $test_name - $action_line"
done
32. $ grep -B5 '+ .* (known after apply)' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action: plans.Update' | wc -l
33. $ sed -n '3551,3560p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
34. $ sed -n '3536,3560p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
35. $ grep -E '^\s+\+ \w+ \(known after apply\)' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -20
36. $ cat > /tmp/find_update_tests.py << 'EOF'
import re

with open('/tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

in_test_case = False
current_action = None
test_start_line = 0

for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    # Look for test case names
    if '".*": {' in line and i > 0 and ('Action:' in ''.join(lines[max(0, i-5):i+10])):
        in_test_case = True
        test_start_line = i
        test_name = re.search(r'"([^"]+)":', line)
        if test_name:
            current_test = test_name.group(1)
        # Find the action in the next few lines
        for j in range(i, min(i+50, len(lines))):
            if 'Action: plans.' in lines[j]:
                action_match = re.search(r'Action:\s*plans\.(\w+)', lines[j])
                if action_match:
                    current_action = action_match.group(1)
                    break
    
    # Look for unknown blocks with known after apply during updates
    if in_test_case and current_action == 'Update' and '+ ' in line and '(known after apply)' in line:
        print(f"Line {i+1}: {current_test} - {line.strip()}")
EOF
python3 /tmp/find_update_tests.py

39. $ for line_num in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  # Find the test case name and action
  test_start=$(sed -n "1,$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -n '".*": {' | tail -1 | cut -d: -f1)
  action_line=$(sed -n "${test_start},$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action:' | head -1)
  test_name=$(sed -n "${test_start}p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/')
  echo "Line $line_num: $test_name - $action_line"
done
40. $ for test_line_num in 3506 4233 4763 5835; do
  action=$(sed -n "$((test_line_num-2)),$((test_line_num+50))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action:' | head -1 | sed 's/.*Action:\s*plans\.\([^,]*\).*/\1/')
  echo "Test at line $test_line_num: Action=$action"
done
41. $ sed -n '3506,3560p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -E '^\s+[\+\-]' 
42. $ sed -n '3423,3435p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
43. $ cat > /tmp/find_changes.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Find all line numbers that match the grep pattern
matching_lines=($(grep -n '+ .* (known after apply)' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | cut -d: -f1))

# For each matching line, find the test case and its action
for line_num in "${matching_lines[@]}"; do
  # Find the test case start (look backwards for the nearest '"': {")
  test_start=0
  for ((i = line_num - 1; i >= 1; i--)); do
    if sed -n "${i}p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -q '".*": {'; then
      test_start=$i
      break
    fi
  done
  
  # Get test name and action
  test_name=$(sed -n "${test_start}p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/')
  action=$(sed -n "$((test_start)),$((line_num))p" /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'Action: plans\.' | head -1 | sed 's/.*Action:\s*plans\.\([^,]*\).*/\1/')
  
  if [ "$action" == "Update" ]; then
    echo "Line $line_num: $test_name - $action"
  fi
done
EOF

bash /tmp/find_changes.sh
44. $ sed -n '5835,5878p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | head -30
45. $ sed -n '5835,5875p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep 'known after apply'
46. $ grep -n '^\s*"+ ' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep unknown
47. $ cat /workspace/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | sed -n '3543,3551p' | cat -A
48. $ bash /tmp/find_changes.sh
49. $ cat > /tmp/find_all_updates.py << 'EOF'
import re

# Read the file
with open('/tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Split by test cases
test_cases = re.split(r'(?<!\w)(["\'])([^"\']+)\1\s*:\s*\{', content)

count = 0
for i in range(2, len(test_cases), 3):
    test_name = test_cases[i]
    test_content = test_cases[i+1] if i+1 < len(test_cases) else ""
    
    # Check if this is an "in-place update" test with unknown blocks
    if 'in-place update' in test_name and 'unknown' in test_name and 'block' in test_name:
        # Check the action
        action_match = re.search(r'Action:\s*plans\.(\w+)', test_content)
        if action_match:
            action = action_match.group(1)
            # Check for the pattern
            if re.search(r'\+\s+\w+\s+\(known after apply\)', test_content):
                if action == 'Update':
                    print(f"Test: {test_name} - Action: {action} - Has '+ ... (known after apply)'")
                    count += 1

print(f"\nTotal: {count}")
EOF
python3 /tmp/find_all_updates.py
50. $ grep -n '+ .*\(known after apply\)' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go | grep -v root_block_device
51. $ sed -n '7800,7820p' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
52. $ go fmt ./internal/command/jsonformat/computed/renderers/unknown.go 2>&1 | head -20
53. $ cat > /tmp/comprehensive_check.py << 'EOF'
import re

with open('/tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go', 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()

current_test = None
current_action = None
start_line = 0
found_plus_unknown = False

for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    # Look for test case start
    if re.match(r'\s*"[^"]+": \{$', line):
        current_test = re.search(r'"([^"]+)"', line).group(1)
        start_line = i + 1
        current_action = None
        found_plus_unknown = False
    
    # Look for Action line
    if 'Action: plans.' in line:
        action_match = re.search(r'Action:\s*plans\.(\w+)', line)
        if action_match:
            current_action = action_match.group(1)
    
    # Look for "unknown" and "block" keywords in test name and content
    if current_test and 'unknown' in current_test and 'block' in current_test:
        # Look for + lines with (known after apply)
        if re.search(r'\+\s+\w+.*\(known after apply\)', line):
            found_plus_unknown = True
            if current_action == 'Update':
                print(f"Found at line {i+1}: {current_test} - Action: {current_action}")
            elif current_action:
                print(f"SKIP at line {i+1}: {current_test} - Action: {current_action}")
EOF
python3 /tmp/comprehensive_check.py
54. $ grep -c 'in-place.*unknown' /tmp/terraform-repo/internal/command/jsonformat/plan_test.go
